creator: tyler@monkeypox.org
text:
Experiencing this, haven't found a way to reproduce it. As far as I can tell
powerd(1) isn't causing the RF switch to be disabled and then re-enabled.

Dec 10 14:29:49 kiwi wpa_supplicant[74635]: wlan0: CTRL-EVENT-DISCONNECTED bssid=02:1a:11:f7:8d:e2 reason=0
